name: Chicken Fricassee
recipeIngredient: 1 3-4 pound stewing chicken or fryer, cut into servings
1 10 oz pkg noodles, cooked and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the chicken and pat dry. Season with salt and paprika.
2. Place sliced vegetables (onions, celery, carrots) and bay leaf in a Crock-Pot.
3. Place chicken pieces on top of the vegetables.
4. Pour in chicken broth. Cover and cook on Low for 8 to 12 hours or on High for 4 to 6 hours.
5. One hour before serving, turn to High. Remove chicken pieces; bone and return meat to Crock-Pot.
6. Make a smooth paste of flour and water and stir into the liquid in the Crock-Pot.
7. Cover and cook until thickened.
8. Serve over hot noodles; sprinkle with chopped parsley.
Serves 6 to 8
